chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-437 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 26-05-2025 Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahessar, Advocate along with applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G. **** Counsel for the applicant, under instructions, does not press instant Crl. Misc. Application and submits that for redressal of his grievance, the applicant would file Crl. Direct Complaint before the competent Court of law having jurisdiction. Order accordingly. JUDGE Ahmad
